# @tyravel/database

Database ORM, query builder, and migrations for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/database
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.2` |
| Source | [`packages/database`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/database) |
| Category | Database |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

- [@tyravel/support](/reference/generated/packages/support)
